chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Ist Appeal No.D-26 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.08.2020 *** This first appeal is called for hearing but none has appeared on behalf of the appellants. No intimation is received. It is noted that since filing of this appeal nobody is pursuing this appeal vigilantly, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
